title: WebSiteMCP Contract
description: The contract format: a category's shared, versioned tool interface, authored once and reused by every site that implements the category.

$schema.description: Optional URL of the schema this file follows.

kind.description: Marks this file as a contract.

id.description: The category's machine id (e.g. `bank`); matches the filename before `@`.

version.description: The interface version; bump it on any tool or input/output change. Matches `@<version>` in the filename.

required.description: Baseline tools every site's binding must implement to claim this category.

tools.description: Every tool this category offers, keyed by tool id; must include a `reachable` probe.

description.description: One sentence telling an agent what the tool does and when to use it.

inputSchema.description: The tool's inputs, as an object of named parameter fields.

outputSchema.description: The tool's output, as an object of named result fields.

errors.description: The full set of errors this tool can return.

code.description: Stable identifier for this failure so the caller can detect and branch on it (e.g. `INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS`).

schemaObject.description: A small JSON-Schema subset for inputSchema and outputSchema: a `type`, plus `properties`/`required` for objects.
